registerSubtitle: Join MotoTracker and start managing your rides.
loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your garage.
dontHaveAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up
successMessage: We sent a secure link to your inbox. Tap it to verify your account and start your engines.
